I'm using Logitech SetPoint software, which is capable of running an external command when I press the middle mouse button. So my idea to use SendKeys to simuluate hitting the Windows Key + Tab. Here's my .vbs script: However, this doesn't work. It appears to "press" the Windows key followed by the tab key instead of pressing them simultaneously.
